nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to generate these ideas for me

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: The ideas that Gemini came out with I never would have dreamt of in my wildest dreams

nodes.label: AI as tool for market and business perspective
AI as future automation of technical design and cutting
nodes.grounding_span: I would love you to be able to tell AI the design you would like in Cricut

nodes.label: Novelty and creative insight
nodes.grounding_span: they were so thoughtful and out of the box

nodes.label: Strategic control and business success
nodes.grounding_span: make my business thrive and showcase my work

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: I do still also create my own ideas too

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: it was a relief and like a weight had lifted off of me

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: optimistic, knowing there was this ability to generate insane ideas to make my business amazing

nodes.label: No personal concern about AI in own work
nodes.grounding_span: I do not have any concerns, AI only seems to help make life easier

nodes.label: Concern for artists directly impacted by AI
nodes.grounding_span: some artists maybe worried about how AI can generate a creative piece of work in seconds

nodes.label: Gut-feeling decision-making — intuitive selection from AI suggestions
nodes.grounding_span: I just go with my gut and the one I felt stood out

nodes.label: Vision-oriented future planning — imagining ideal automated workflow
